title: Money finds me through every door
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for when income channels need widening.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 32 of the MONEY program for when income still feels limited to the routes you can already name.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 32 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 32 of the MONEY program. The statement is about openness to income routes you haven't yet named or planned.
Money finds me through every door. I am open to all the ways it arrives.

Say it three times in the morning. "Every door" is not a vague statement: it means the client referral you didn't expect, the product that keeps selling, the cheque from a forgotten account, the invoice that paid early. All of it.
Adapted from Day 32 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
